title: aulacocalyx subulata subsp. glabra
intro: Aulacocalyx subulata subsp. glabra, also known as the glabrous subulata aulacocalyx, is a plant species within the Rubiaceae family, native to tropical Africa. This plant is valued for its medicinal properties, which include analgesic, anti-inflammatory, and antimicrobial activities. The health benefits of Aulacocalyx subulata subsp. glabra include its ability to treat fever, rheumatism, and skin conditions, as well as its use as an antiseptic and antibacterial agent. Herbal preparations of this plant can be made into teas, infusions, or decoctions, and are typically consumed to take advantage of its medicinal properties.
